name: Security Issue
about: Report a security vulnerability
title: "DO NOT USE THIS TEMPLATE FOR SENSITIVE ISSUES"
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

## ⚠️ Stop — Do not publicly disclose security vulnerabilities here.

If you have found a security vulnerability in Lvau, **please do not file it as a public GitHub issue**.

Instead, follow the responsible disclosure process described in [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md):

1. Open a [private security advisory](https://github.com/lasder-ca/lvau/security/advisories/new) on GitHub
2. Or contact the maintainers via the email on the [GitHub profile](https://github.com/lasder-ca)

Thank you for helping keep Lvau secure.

---

If your issue is **not** a security vulnerability (e.g., a question about security features, a documentation improvement, or a non-sensitive bug), please use the [Bug Report](bug_report.md) or [Feature Request](feature_request.md) templates instead.
